abyss-shard.name: Abyss Shard
abyss-shard.description: A fractured purple crystal blade whose shards swirl like wraiths. Each strike whispers with the echo of vanished steps, and the dagger bends time to let you strike again in its shadow.

adventurer-s-kit.name: Adventurer's Kit
adventurer-s-kit.description: A rugged pack containing everything a true wanderer needs, plus a canteen.

amber-bow.name: Amber Bow
amber-bow.description: A simple hair bow tied from silky orange ribbon. Youthful and warm, it's a favorite among festival-goers and hopeful romantics.

amber-loop.name: Amber Loop
amber-loop.description: A warm-toned loop earring carved from resin and polished to a soft glow.

arcane-boots.name: Arcane Boots
arcane-boots.description: Enchanted boots that anchor the caster's focus, allowing movement and casting without interruption.

arcane-chest.name: Arcane Chest
arcane-chest.description: A robe reinforced with arcane channels that continuously draw ambient mana, sustaining prolonged spellcasting.

arcane-gloves.name: Arcane Gloves
arcane-gloves.description: Arcane-threaded gloves that respond instinctively to intent, aiding both restorative and enhancing magic.

arcane-legs.name: Arcane Legs
arcane-legs.description: Runes etched along the fabric amplify both spellcraft and physical technique, rewarding practiced control.

archer-s-beads.name: Archer's Beads
archer-s-beads.description: A band of smooth wood adorned with colored beads. Said to steady the hand and sharpen the eye when loosing an arrow.

arrowcatch-wall.name: Arrowcatch Wall
arrowcatch-wall.description: A thick iron wall shield with arrows embedded in its surface, a badge of survival in battle.

ashwalker-chest.name: Ashwalker Chest
ashwalker-chest.description: A sleek leather vest perfect for slipping through shadows and swiping treasures.

ashwalker-legs.name: Ashwalker Legs
ashwalker-legs.description: Light and flexible pants that let you dart, dash, and disappear in a blink.

ashwalker-shoes.name: Ashwalker Shoes
ashwalker-shoes.description: Whisper-quiet shoes that make each step feel like a breeze.

axe.name: Axe
axe.description: A primitive hatchet fashioned from raw iron chunks.

axe-of-oblivion.name: Axe of Oblivion
axe-of-oblivion.description: An axe veined with frozen light. Each swing scatters shards that bite deeper than steel, leaving silence in their wake.

azure-antlers.name: Azure Antlers
azure-antlers.description: Twisted antlers formed from crystallized mana. Said to resonate with nearby spellcraft.

azure-crown.name: Azure Crown
azure-crown.description: Infused with crystalline magic, this crown enhances magical prowess and clarity of thought.

azure-cutlass.name: Azure Cutlass
statsSecondary: Damage vs Water Enemies: +10% +1% per refine
azure-cutlass.description: A sapphire-hilted blade with a shimmering edge.

azure-flow.name: Azure Flow
statsSecondary: Chance to autocast Hydro Vortex when attacking: +5%

parsedStats.label: Chance to autocast Hydro Vortex when attacking

azure-flow.description: A volatile focus blade that bends mana flow far beyond safe limits. Greatly enhances spellcasting and arcane discharge at the cost of catastrophic mana stability.

azure-prism.name: Azure Prism
azure-prism.description: A magical shard that glows brighter with focus. Reflects the wearer's resolve.

azure-tag.name: Azure Tag
azure-tag.description: A bold, rectangular tag of pure cobalt blue.

backpack.name: Backpack
backpack.description: A sturdy crate lashed tight with supplies. Built for long journeys.

batling-familiar.name: Batling Familiar
batling-familiar.description: A tiny demonic bat with a single eye. Hovers at the bearer's side as a cursed pet.

battle-bonnet.name: Battle Bonnet
battle-bonnet.description: A rugged cap with a striking red plume, worn by daring skirmishers known for lighting up the battlefield with sudden strikes. The feather's color never fades, even in rain.

bear-backpack.name: Bear Backpack
bear-backpack.description: A rugged, bear-themed backpack with a stubby tail and a padded frame. Meant to represent quiet strength and natural resilience.

bear-hug-hood.name: Bear Hug Hood
bear-hug-hood.description: A plush headwrap in the image of a curious cub. Offers minimal protection, but maximal charm.

beast-helm.name: Beast Helm
beast-helm.description: A feral headpiece shaped like a monster's skull. Strikes fear into foes and emboldens its wearer.

binding-spirits-staff.name: Binding Spirits Staff
binding-spirits-staff.description: A staff etched with sigils of control, binding death magic into faster, more violent release.

bishop-s-hood.name: Bishop's Hood
statsSecondary: Chance to autocast Holy Light when attacking: +2% per refine

parsedStats.label: Chance to autocast Holy Light when attacking

bishop-s-hood.description: A tall, blue-gold ceremonial hat. Worn by high clergy during rituals.

blade-of-eclipse.name: Blade of Eclipse
blade-of-eclipse.description: A sword forged where light and shadow converge. Its scarlet edge burns with hunger, punishing swift and sure, while its dark core shields the bearer from ruin.

blade-standard.name: Blade Standard
blade-standard.description: A battle-banner shaped like a sword, carried to rally allies and strike fear into foes.

blight-reaver.name: Blight Reaver
blight-reaver.description: A corrupted reaping blade that turns fallen bodies into instruments of ruin.

blindfold.name: Blindfold
blindfold.description: A crimson band drawn over the eyes, sharpening inner focus and channeling deeper reserves of mana.

blood-clip.name: Blood Clip
blood-clip.description: A small fang taken from a desert beast, worn to invoke its cunning spirit.

bloodbound.name: Bloodbound
bloodbound.description: Crimson-wrapped greaves that cling to life with every strike, feeding the wearer with stolen strength.

bloom-of-midnight.name: Bloom of Midnight
bloom-of-midnight.description: A ceremonial weapon that blossoms in firelight. With each strike, it radiates both ruin and renewal.

bloom-pendant.name: Bloom Pendant
bloom-pendant.description: An orange flower charm said to bring warmth and cheer. Its petals never wilt, even in harsh winds.

bloom-ring.name: Bloom Ring
bloom-ring.description: A vibrant petal-shaped charm known to bring out one's inner light and cheer.

blue-shell.name: Blue Shell
blue-shell.description: A polished shell threaded with mana channels. It improves flow and focus rather than brute strength.

blunderbuss.name: Blunderbuss
statsSecondary: Deals increased damage at close range: +50%

parsedStats.label: Deals increased damage at close range

blunderbuss.description: A wide-mouthed firearm built for point-blank destruction, sacrificing control for sheer stopping power.

bone-channeler.name: Bone Channeler
bone-channeler.description: A crooked wand carved from sacred beast bone. Tingles with latent magic.

bone-helm.name: Bone Helm
bone-helm.description: A crude helm fashioned from the skull of a slain monster. Its jagged fangs jut outward, a grisly reminder of the hunt.

bonefang.name: Bonefang
bonefang.description: Carved from fang and marrow, its poisoned edge festers wounds. Each cut drips venom that saps strength over time.

breezeguard-chest.name: Breezeguard Chest
breezeguard-chest.description: A light, wind-woven cuirass trimmed with skycloth. Its airy design sharpens reflexes and quickens spellcasting, letting the wearer move like a passing breeze.

breezeguard-legs.name: Breezeguard Legs
breezeguard-legs.description: Shorts reinforced with teal wind-thread. They reduce drag and lighten every stride, allowing swifter movement with effortless grace.

breezeguard-shoes.name: Breezeguard Shoes
breezeguard-shoes.description: Feather-soft sandals built for nimble footwork. They accelerate step cadence and quicken attacks without sacrificing comfort.

brimblade.name: Brimblade
brimblade.description: A brutal cleaver wrapped in charred bindings.

broad-sword.name: Broad Sword
broad-sword.description: Standard-issue sword of royal guards, reliable and sharp.

bronze-crescent.name: Bronze Crescent
bronze-crescent.description: A warped crescent-shaped earring that hums faintly during dusk.

bronze-plugs.name: Bronze Plugs
bronze-plugs.description: Simple and heavy bronze plugs. Worn by warriors who value grit over glamor.

bubblebeast-hood.name: Bubblebeast Hood
bubblebeast-hood.description: Soft, squishy, and oddly buoyant. Popular with young adventurers and questionable scientists.

buckler.name: Buckler
buckler.description: A sleek, lightweight shield with a diamond-shaped emblem. Easy to wield and favored by agile fighters.

bunny-backpack.name: Bunny Backpack
bunny-backpack.description: A cuddly backpack shaped like a bunny, complete with long ears and a fluffy pom tail. Its soft look gives off an innocent charm, perfect for adventurers with a gentle heart.

bunny-cap.name: Bunny Cap
bunny-cap.description: A lunar-themed hood resembling a mythical moon rabbit. Boosts agility and quickness.

centurion-helm.name: Centurion Helm
centurion-helm.description: A proud red plume crowns this polished helm, a relic from a time of imperial order and brutal discipline.

cerulean-scepter.name: Cerulean Scepter
statsSecondary: Chance to autocast Heal when attacking: +3% per refine

parsedStats.label: Chance to autocast Heal when attacking

cerulean-scepter.description: A sacred mace of radiant blue crystal. Its strikes resound with divine rhythm, blessing allies and smiting foes alike.

chainfrost-staff.name: Chainfrost Staff
chainfrost-staff.description: A staff crowned with frozen rings of ice. Each cast echoes in chilling succession, chaining shards of frost between foes.

chains-of-binding.name: Chains of Binding
chains-of-binding.description: A cursed weight tethered by heavy chains. Said to seal spirits and restrain the wicked.

chaos-reaver.name: Chaos Reaver
chaos-reaver.description: A fractured twin-blade bound around a volatile core. Each strike carries the promise of collapse.

cheshire-cat.name: Cheshire Cat
statsSecondary: Chance to autocast Shadow Strike when attacking: +2% per refine

parsedStats.label: Chance to autocast Shadow Strike when attacking

cheshire-cat.description: A mischievous feline with eyes like twin voids. Its grin widens when danger nears, releasing shadows that strike unseen.

chicky-hood.name: Chicky Hood
chicky-hood.description: Worn by the brave (or confused) poultry knights. Surprisingly durable.

chirpy-hat.name: Chirpy Hat
chirpy-hat.description: A bashful chick sits snugly on your head. Its warmth is oddly soothing.

chompy-hood.name: Chompy Hood
chompy-hood.description: A fearsome helm styled after a deep sea predator. The teeth aren't just for show.

chromatic-blade.name: Chromatic Blade
chromatic-blade.description: A spectrum-tuned weapon that shifts its nature to match the battlefield.

cleric-chest.name: Cleric Chest
cleric-chest.description: Robes sewn with golden thread that shimmer like sunrise, warming allies with every gesture.

cleric-legs.name: Cleric Legs
cleric-legs.description: Flowing trousers of pale linen, embroidered with small runes of renewal that pulse when allies are near.

cleric-shoes.name: Cleric Shoes
cleric-shoes.description: Slippers that glow faintly as they touch the ground, said to carry the prayers of their wearer forward.

cloud-loop.name: Cloud Loop
cloud-loop.description: A soft, weightless earring shaped like a puff of fog. Said to drift slightly with your breath.

codex-of-revelation.name: Codex of Revelation
codex-of-revelation.description: A codex that glows with the memory of creation. Every verse etched within sings of genesis and undoing, calling forth light that judges as it heals.

codex-umbra.name: Codex Umbra
statsSecondary: Chance to autocast Wide Curse when hit: +1% per refine

parsedStats.label: Chance to autocast Wide Curse when hit

codex-umbra.description: An ominous scripture bound in blackened iron and skin, whispering forbidden verses. When struck, its wards unravel, releasing a wave of shadow that grips all nearby.

codex-vitae.name: Codex Vitae
statsSecondary: Chance to autocast Heal when hit: +1% per refine

parsedStats.label: Chance to autocast Heal when hit

codex-vitae.description: A heavy tome bound in living vines and gold thread. Each page pulses with lifeforce.

combat-knife.name: Combat Knife
combat-knife.description: Battle-scarred and unadorned, this knife saps foes with every slash.

compass-of-dawn.name: Compass of Dawn
compass-of-dawn.description: An ornate compass glowing with faint light. Guides the bearer toward fortune and safety.

crimson-crest.name: Crimson Crest
crimson-crest.description: A badge of honor among elite warriors. Its golden feathers flare brightest in the heat of combat.

crown-of-spikes.name: Crown of Spikes
crown-of-spikes.description: A dangerous relic forged for arena champions. Its presence intimidates foes.

crystal-cache.name: Crystal Cache
crystal-cache.description: A secure bin filled with refined mana stones. Radiates arcane energy.

crystal-slammer.name: Crystal Slammer
crystal-slammer.description: Towering and jagged, this hammer crackles with unstable blue energy. Each swing can fracture the air itself, seeding the battlefield with volatile magic surges.

crystal-wings.name: Crystal Wings
crystal-wings.description: Shards of glowing crystal arranged like wings. They shimmer faintly with elemental energy.

curse-tag.name: Curse Tag
curse-tag.description: A sacred paper charm used to ward off spirits, or bind them. Careful not to misplace the top.

daggers.name: Daggers
daggers.description: A double-sheathed back holster made for swift, silent strikes.

darkfeather-wings.name: Darkfeather Wings
darkfeather-wings.description: Pitch-black wings of a cursed raven. They whisper omens when spread.

darkhide-gloves.name: Darkhide Gloves
darkhide-gloves.description: Blackened hide gloves that hold a dull inner heat. The warmth quickens the blood.

dawn-prayer.name: Dawn Prayer
dawn-prayer.description: Worn by monks at sunrise rites, each bead marks a whispered vow.

dawnstar.name: Dawnstar
statsSecondary: Chance to autocast Holy Light when attacking: +3% per refine

parsedStats.label: Chance to autocast Holy Light when attacking

dawnstar.description: A heavy ring-shaped mace lined with radiant sigils, bursting with holy arcs.

death-s-grin.name: Death's Grin
death-s-grin.description: A grinning death mask often worn during festivals… or to unsettle enemies.

digger-s-flask.name: Digger's Flask
digger-s-flask.description: Not just for water, perfect for carrying both hope and stubbornness into the mines.

dino-cub-backpack.name: Dino Cub Backpack
dino-cub-backpack.description: A cute prehistoric companion backpack with blue scales.

direwolf-chest.name: Direwolf Chest
direwolf-chest.description: A wild, battle-worn chestplate that pulses with raw, untamed power.

direwolf-legs.name: Direwolf Legs
direwolf-legs.description: Rugged leg armor built to charge into danger without a second thought.

direwolf-shoes.name: Direwolf Shoes
direwolf-shoes.description: Gritty boots made for stomping through battlefields like a true berserker.

discipline-band.name: Discipline Band
discipline-band.description: A sharp v-cut band worn by elite martial scholars.

divine-blade.name: Divine Blade
statsSecondary: Damage vs Shadow Enemies: +10% +1% per refine
divine-blade.description: A wide-bladed sword with a crown-shaped guard.

doom-crescent.name: Doom Crescent
doom-crescent.description: A massive black axe etched with grim motifs.

doom-keg.name: Doom Keg
doom-keg.description: A barrel packed with explosives. The skull ensures nobody asks what's inside.

drooping-bat.name: Drooping Bat
drooping-bat.description: A sleepy bat clings upside-down to your head, feeding off stray magic and bloodshed. Occasionally, it shares its spoils with you.

drooping-burrow.name: Drooping Burrow
statsSecondary: Chance to autocast Earthbolt when attacking: +2% per refine

parsedStats.label: Chance to autocast Earthbolt when attacking

drooping-burrow.description: A sleepy mole burrows deep into your hair, snoring softly until battle stirs it. When roused, it flings chunks of enchanted earth toward your enemies.

drooping-cat.name: Drooping Cat
statsSecondary: Chance to autocast Thunderbolt when attacking: +2% per refine

parsedStats.label: Chance to autocast Thunderbolt when attacking

drooping-cat.description: A smug, storm-charged feline rests on your head. Its fur crackles faintly with static, occasionally releasing tiny lightning bolts when you attack.

drooping-flora.name: Drooping Flora
statsSecondary: Chance to autocast Icebolt when attacking: +2% per refine

parsedStats.label: Chance to autocast Icebolt when attacking

drooping-flora.description: A fragile water blossom perches on your head, its petals heavy with frost. Though it droops sleepily, it snaps awake to launch icy bolts at your foes.

drooping-pup.name: Drooping Pup
statsSecondary: Chance to autocast Firebolt when attacking: +2% per refine

parsedStats.label: Chance to autocast Firebolt when attacking

drooping-pup.description: A fiery little pup snoozes atop your head, its breath warm as embers. When roused, it barks out bursts of flame in your defense.

dualblade-sheath.name: Dualblade Sheath
dualblade-sheath.description: A leather harness that holds twin blades, ready for a flurry of strikes.

duskfang.name: Duskfang
statsSecondary: Damage vs Holy Enemies: +10% +1% per refine
duskfang.description: A favored blade among duellists who thrive in the dark.

dustweaver-hat.name: Dustweaver Hat
dustweaver-hat.description: A rugged hat favored by wandering sorcerers. Its tattered brim has weathered many a sandstorm.

earth-shaker.name: Earth Shaker
earth-shaker.description: Each impact lands like a thunderclap, scattering foes on contact.

eclipse-kunai.name: Eclipse Kunai
statsSecondary: Twist Of Fate Damage +15% +2% per refine

parsedStats.label: Twist Of Fate Damage +15% +2% per refine

eclipse-kunai.description: Blades steeped in lunar darkness, empowering your shadow arts and hastening their return with each strike.

edge-of-twilight.name: Edge of Twilight
edge-of-twilight.description: Twin blades woven from light and shadow. Each strike cuts with harmony and thunderous speed.

elixir-gourd.name: Elixir Gourd
elixir-gourd.description: A mystical flask sealed with wax and sigils. Said to carry a potion that never runs dry.

emberhide-helm.name: Emberhide Helm
emberhide-helm.description: A cruel, red-eyed mask shaped like a beast. Worn by cultists and dark knights.

embershard.name: Embershard
embershard.description: A wand infused with a burning red gem, pulsing with fire energy.

endurance-gauntlets.name: Endurance Gauntlets
endurance-gauntlets.description: Heavy and resolute, they guard the wearer with unyielding resilience.

endurance-greaves.name: Endurance Greaves
endurance-greaves.description: Heavy greaves designed to endure punishment without faltering.

endurance-plate.name: Endurance Plate
endurance-plate.description: Layer upon layer of tempered steel, built to outlast sieges and weather any hardship.

endurance-shoes.name: Endurance Shoes
endurance-shoes.description: Sturdy footwear built to support long battles and heavy strain.

everfrost-staff.name: Everfrost Staff
statsSecondary: Chance to autocast ? when hit: +1% per refine
everfrost-staff.description: A staff carved from frozen crystal, eternally rimed with frost. Each strike carries the chill of endless winter, conjuring freezing fields upon impact.

executioner-axe.name: Executioner Axe
executioner-axe.description: Built to finish what others hesitate to start.

explorer-s-pack.name: Explorer's Pack
explorer-s-pack.description: A rugged backpack with bedroll and straps. Reliable gear for long expeditions.

eye-of-vigil.name: Eye of Vigil
eye-of-vigil.description: A twisted staff crowned with a watchful eye. Said to pierce illusions and see truths hidden from mortals.

eyepatch.name: Eyepatch
eyepatch.description: An eyepatch once worn by the infamous Marauder of the East.

falcon-band.name: Falcon Band
falcon-band.description: A hunter's relic said to grant the sharp sight of a falcon and the swiftness of its strike.

fang-clip.name: Fang Clip
fang-clip.description: A small fang taken from a desert beast, worn to invoke its cunning spirit.

fang-of-the-moon.name: Fang of the Moon
fang-of-the-moon.description: A curved blade kissed by lunar shadow. Its bite drinks both blood and mana, vanishing into the night.

fate-gauntlets.name: Fate Gauntlets
fate-gauntlets.description: Whispered to bend fate itself, these gloves carry luck in every gamble.

fate-greaves.name: Fate Greaves
fate-greaves.description: Decorated greaves believed to attract favorable outcomes in uncertain moments.

fate-plate.name: Fate Plate
fate-plate.description: Adorned with subtle charms, the armor bends fate itself, tilting fortune ever so slightly in the wearer's favor.

fate-shoes.name: Fate Shoes
fate-shoes.description: Unassuming shoes said to subtly bend chance in the wearer's favor.

feathered-scout-hat.name: Feathered Scout Hat
feathered-scout-hat.description: Lightweight and agile, this cap is favored by rangers and messengers of the wild.

ferncloak.name: Ferncloak
ferncloak.description: Woven with enchanted ferns, this cloak muffles sound and motion alike. Rangers and scouts wear it to vanish into the underbrush as if nature herself wrapped them in silence.

festival-rockets.name: Festival Rockets
festival-rockets.description: Decorative explosives that crackle with joy. Sometimes distracts enemies.

flame-tongue-kunai.name: Flame Tongue Kunai
statsSecondary: Chance to autocast Fire Release when attacking: +1% per refine

parsedStats.label: Chance to autocast Fire Release when attacking

flame-tongue-kunai.description: Engraved with fiery seals, these blades erupt with bursts of flame, scorching enemies in a splash of fire.

flameburst-kunai.name: Flameburst Kunai
flameburst-kunai.description: Runed to contain volatile heat, these kunai release fire in sudden, focused bursts upon impact, scorching everything caught within.

fleetrunner.name: Fleetrunner
fleetrunner.description: Tailored for long-distance messengers and nimble thieves, these padded pants never chafe and always breathe, no matter how far or fast you run.

flintlock-pistol.name: Flintlock Pistol
flintlock-pistol.description: An old-world firearm modified for aggressive tactics, empowering rapid techniques at the cost of efficiency.

focus-band.name: Focus Band
focus-band.description: A leather-stone band that steadies the body and heightens focus.

forest-chest.name: Forest Chest
forest-chest.description: Woven from light island fibers and spirit-thread, this chestpiece favors freedom of motion and steady endurance over heavy protection.

forest-friend-hat.name: Forest Friend Hat
forest-friend-hat.description: Crowned with leaves and roots, it binds the wearer to the pulse of the natural world.

forest-legs.name: Forest Legs
forest-legs.description: Flexible leg wraps that move easily through sand and surf, allowing spells and strikes to flow without pause.

forest-shoes.name: Forest Shoes
forest-shoes.description: Soft-soled shoes that grip stone and shore alike, prized by travelers who never stay still for long.

fortified-guardwall.name: Fortified Guardwall
fortified-guardwall.description: A reinforced shield built for impact rather than coverage. Its mass and rigid spine turn every bash into a crushing blow, breaking guard and resolve alike.

frost-mark.name: Frost Mark
frost-mark.description: A cold-forged rifle etched with chilling sigils. Its shots sap movement and leave enemies frozen in their tracks.

frostfang.name: Frostfang
statsSecondary: Chance to autocast Ice Shard when attacking: +2% per refine

parsedStats.label: Chance to autocast Ice Shard when attacking

frostfang.description: An axe etched with icy wings. Carries the chilling breath of frozen winds.

frostshard.name: Frostshard
frostshard.description: A wand tipped with a pale blue crystal, channeling raw frost magic.

frostspire-guard.name: Frostspire Guard
frostspire-guard.description: Crystalline spokes radiate from a frozen core, splintering cold into harmless fragments. The deeper the chill, the firmer its defense.

frostspire-kunai.name: Frostspire Kunai
frostspire-kunai.description: Cold to the touch, these runed kunai channel the chill of deep waters, empowering your Ice Release with slower, sharper frost.

fruit-bowl.name: Fruit Bowl
fruit-bowl.description: A bowl of mysterious green fruit.

fuma-shuriken.name: Fuma Shuriken
fuma-shuriken.description: A deadly, multi-edged star forged for silent killers. Swift and precise, it strikes with explosive critical force, travelling faster than the naked eye can see.

gatling-gun.name: Gatling Gun
gatling-gun.description: A rotating barrel weapon designed to saturate targets with sustained fire, trading accuracy for relentless pressure.

ghostly-hat.name: Ghostly Hat
ghostly-hat.description: A faint specter drifts above your head, its hollow gaze following your every move. Though harmless, its presence chills the air and wards off unseen evils.

glimmerthorn.name: Glimmerthorn
glimmerthorn.description: A gnarled wand embedded with luminous blue shards. Shines brighter when danger nears.

golden-aegis.name: Golden Aegis
statsSecondary: Chance to reflect single target magic: +3% per refine

parsedStats.label: Chance to reflect single target magic

golden-aegis.description: An honored crest once borne by royal guardians, its lion visage is said to awaken when its wielder stands against overwhelming odds. Valor, not victory, is its true calling.

golden-axe.name: Golden Axe
statsSecondary: Chance to autocast Bash when attacking: +2% per refine

parsedStats.label: Chance to autocast Bash when attacking

golden-axe.description: Forged beneath a relentless sun, this golden axe's tremor-shocks can stun foes in a concussive bash.

golden-crown.name: Golden Crown
golden-crown.description: The mark of a true monarch. Light as air, but heavy with legacy.

golden-hammer.name: Golden Hammer
statsSecondary: Chance to autocast Soul Strike when attacking: +3% per refine

parsedStats.label: Chance to autocast Soul Strike when attacking

golden-hammer.description: A ceremonial warhammer gilded in radiant gold. Though ornate, its weight is no less brutal. Each strike rings with divine judgment, and its blows channel the soul's own fury.

golden-hoop.name: Golden Hoop
golden-hoop.description: A classic gold ring. Favored by pirates, merchants, and those who wish to be both.

grasping-eye-urn.name: Grasping Eye Urn
grasping-eye-urn.description: A cursed vessel sprouting a blood-red hand and a glaring eye. Said to seize the souls of the fallen.

gravemarrow-chest.name: Gravemarrow Chest
gravemarrow-chest.description: A bone-bound harness etched with violet sigils. It channels necrotic force through the rib-like plating, greatly amplifying status damage while nullifying bleeding curses.

gravemarrow-legs.name: Gravemarrow Legs
gravemarrow-legs.description: Shorn bone wraps held together with spectral cords. They pulse with hexing energy, empowering maledictions while shielding the wearer from curses.

gravemarrow-shoes.name: Gravemarrow Shoes
gravemarrow-shoes.description: Bone-shard shoes stained faintly purple. Each step releases a subtle toxic resonance, boosting poison-laden strikes while rendering the wearer immune to venom.

gravestone-breaker.name: Gravestone Breaker
statsSecondary: Damage vs Undead Enemies: +10% +1% per refine
gravestone-breaker.description: A sanctified dwarven relic once used to break cursed tombs and barrows.

green-shell.name: Green Shell
green-shell.description: A dense, fortified shell favored by those who endure. Built to withstand blows that would shatter lesser defenses.

grim-scythe.name: Grim Scythe
grim-scythe.description: A blackened scythe with a pale edge. Said to drink the souls of those it fells.

grimoire-of-binding-light.name: Grimoire of Binding Light
grimoire-of-binding-light.description: Gilded pages radiate a glow that sears shadows and wards the faithful.

guardblade.name: Guardblade
guardblade.description: A refined variant of the basic blade, often used by city guards and mercenaries. Offers balanced reach and weight without sacrificing control.

happy-chipper-hat.name: Happy Chipper Hat
happy-chipper-hat.description: A soft cap modeled after the cheeriest critter in the forest. Surprisingly popular with assassins.

harlequin-s-hood.name: Harlequin's Hood
harlequin-s-hood.description: A fool's grin hides a scholar's eyes. Worn by those who dance the line between brilliance and madness, its emerald hue masks a mind alight with truths too heavy to bear.

harvester-of-souls.name: Harvester of Souls

master-bow.name: Master Bow

master-codex.name: Master Codex
master-codex.description: A meticulously compiled record of arcane law, refined through countless revisions.

master-dagger.name: Master Dagger

master-katar.name: Master Katar
master-katar.description: A blade honed for decisive strikes, rewarding perfect timing and lethal accuracy.

master-pistol.name: Master Pistol

master-scythe.name: Master Scythe

master-spear.description: This ceremonial spear is wrapped in battle-stained cloth, a symbol of discipline and precision. Favored by veterans for its reach and balance.

master-wand.name: Master Wand

mind-greaves.name: Mind Greaves

mind-shoes.name: Mind Shoes

mindweave.description: Soft layers laced with focus runes. Each step clears the mind, and each motion channels magic.

mystic-hood.name: Mystic Hood
mystic-hood.description: A hood worn by nomadic spellcasters. It muffles both sound and thought.

necronomicon.name: Necronomicon

neko-hood.name: Neko Hood

skystrider-chest.name: Skystrider Chest
skystrider-chest.description: A proud and polished breastplate that makes you feel like a true defender of justice.

skystrider-legs.name: Skystrider Legs
skystrider-legs.description: Solid greaves built for holding your ground, even when the world shakes.

skystrider-shoes.name: Skystrider Shoes
skystrider-shoes.description: Heavy boots that echo with honor, offering strength in every step.

slingshot.name: Slingshot
slingshot.description: A playful yet surprisingly powerful ranged toy, perfect for nimble hands and sharp eyes!

sniper-rifle.name: Sniper Rifle
sniper-rifle.description: A precision rifle built for deliberate kills, amplifying specialized shots that punish careless positioning.

snowbun-earmuffs.name: Snowbun Earmuffs
snowbun-earmuffs.description: These fluffy puffs might keep you warm, or attract snow spirits. Possibly both.

solar-pulse.name: Solar Pulse
statsSecondary: Chance to autocast Meteor when attacking: +5%

parsedStats.label: Chance to autocast Meteor when attacking

solar-pulse.description: A blazing conduit of motion that converts momentum into raw destruction. Grants extreme speed and fluidity, bleeding vitality with every strike.

solar-relic.name: Solar Relic
solar-relic.description: A radiant emblem resembling the sun. Warm to the touch and brimming with divine energy.

solar-spear.name: Solar Spear
solar-spear.description: A gleaming gold-tipped spear blessed by the sun.

soulbinder-chest.name: Soulbinder Chest
soulbinder-chest.description: A mantle adorned with bone clasps, its inner lining stitched with sigils that tether life to another.

soulbinder-legs.name: Soulbinder Legs
soulbinder-legs.description: Tattered wraps bound with faintly glowing chains, binding your stride to the strength of your servant.

soulbinder-shoes.name: Soulbinder Shoes
soulbinder-shoes.description: Silent sandals that leave faint ash prints—said to be the footsteps of spirits walking alongside you.

speed-gauntlets.name: Speed Gauntlets
speed-gauntlets.description: Light, responsive gloves that flow with every sudden step or strike.

speed-greaves.name: Speed Greaves
speed-greaves.description: Light greaves that reduce drag and encourage swift movement.

speed-plate.name: Speed Plate
speed-plate.description: Streamlined and light, its plates move like flowing water, carrying the wearer swiftly through battle.

speed-shoes.name: Speed Shoes
speed-shoes.description: Lightweight shoes favored by those who rely on agility over armor.

spellthread-chest.name: Spellthread Chest
spellthread-chest.description: A flowing robe infused with arcane threads, pulsing gently with magical energy.

spellthread-legs.name: Spellthread Legs
spellthread-legs.description: Light and comfy leggings stitched with runes, perfect for long study sessions or spellcasting marathons.

spellthread-shoes.name: Spellthread Shoes
spellthread-shoes.description: Slippers soft as clouds, keeping your steps swift and your mind sharp.

spiked-club.name: Spiked Club
statsSecondary: Chance to autocast Stun Attack when attacking: +3% per refine

parsedStats.label: Chance to autocast Stun Attack when attacking

spiked-club.description: A blunt weapon with crude iron spikes jutting from its surface.

spikesteel-helm.name: Spikesteel Helm
spikesteel-helm.description: A brutal helm forged from jagged iron. Its cruel grin strikes fear before the first blow.

spineshard.name: Spineshard
spineshard.description: A jagged sword lined with cruel spikes. Forged for intimidation as much as bloodshed.

spirit-familiar.name: Spirit Familiar
spirit-familiar.description: A spectral bird bound to a crystal shard. It circles its master, warding off danger.

spooky-spell-hat.name: Spooky Spell Hat
spooky-spell-hat.description: A crooked cap adorned with cursed trinkets. Rumored to enhance volatile magics.

springram-horns.name: Springram Horns
springram-horns.description: Carved from ram ivory and adorned with blossoms, they symbolize renewal and resilience.

staff-of-eternis.name: Staff of Eternis
staff-of-eternis.description: A staff crowned with spectral wings, humming with every element at once. Each incantation flows faster than thought.

star.name: Star
star.description: A gleaming gold star. It catches the light, and your target.

starbound-hat.name: Starbound Hat
starbound-hat.description: Worn by magicians who study the skies, this hat channels starlight through its enchanted buckle.

stiletto.name: Stiletto
stiletto.description: Needle-thin and wickedly sharp, this dagger excels at piercing weak spots and slipping past defenses unseen.

stoneguard.name: Stoneguard
stoneguard.description: Forged in the caverns beneath ancient forests, this weighty chestpiece is said to borrow its endurance from the roots of the world itself. A favorite among front-liners who refuse to budge.

stonepoint-spear.name: Stonepoint Spear
stonepoint-spear.description: A short spear tipped with sharp stone. Lightweight and easy to wield.

stormburst-crossbow.name: Stormburst Crossbow
stormburst-crossbow.description: A heavy crossbow engineered to unleash a rain of bolts. Its mechanism sacrifices precision for a devastating spread that blankets the battlefield.

stormcall-kunai.name: Stormcall Kunai
statsSecondary: Chance to autocast Chain Lightning when attacking: +1% per refine

parsedStats.label: Chance to autocast Chain Lightning when attacking

stormcall-kunai.description: Each strike crackles with unstable energy, chaining lightning between nearby foes in a sudden storm.

stormcaller-totem.name: Stormcaller Totem
stormcaller-totem.description: A spiraling charm bound in metal and jade, crackling faintly with static. Said to channel the whispers of tempests.

stormfeather-kunai.name: Stormfeather Kunai
stormfeather-kunai.description: Crackling with stormfire, these blades resonate with the call of the phoenix, amplifying your Lightning Release with fierce precision.

stormpiercer.name: Stormpiercer
stormpiercer.description: Electrified tip and perfect balance let you hurl lightning-fast jabs and even fling the spear to cleave distant foes.

stormplate-chest.name: Stormplate Chest
stormplate-chest.description: A heavy breastplate lined with insulating alloys. It stores ambient mana within its frame, boosting reserves while dampening incoming magic.

stormplate-legs.name: Stormplate Legs
stormplate-legs.description: Thick greaves reinforced with storm-tempered plating. They bolster mana flow and help diffuse electrical and arcane impacts.

stormplate-shoes.name: Stormplate Shoes
stormplate-shoes.description: Solid, blue-trimmed boots crafted from shock-resistant metal. They channel mana through the soles, improving reserves and softening magical blows.

sun-emblem.name: Sun Emblem
statsSecondary: Chance to autocast Heal when hit: +3% per refine

parsedStats.label: Chance to autocast Heal when hit

sun-emblem.description: A radiant sigil forged in ancient brass, symbolizing divine judgment and unwavering resolve.

sun-lion-crest.name: Sun Lion Crest
sun-lion-crest.description: A golden shield adorned with a regal lion motif. Inspires bravery and glows faintly when danger is near.

sunbound-mitts.name: Sunbound Mitts
sunbound-mitts.description: Bright yellow mitts infused with radiant dyes. Soft, warm, and uplifting to wear.

sunflare.name: Sunflare
statsSecondary: Damage vs Earth Enemies: +10% +1% per refine
sunflare.description: A blazing shortblade radiating intense heat.

sunflower-clip.name: Sunflower Clip
sunflower-clip.description: A cheerful yellow bloom that seems to carry the warmth of a summer morning. Often worn by carefree travelers and village healers alike.

swampy-hat.name: Swampy Hat
statsSecondary: Chance to autocast Gunk Shot when attacking: +2% per refine

parsedStats.label: Chance to autocast Gunk Shot when attacking

swampy-hat.description: A suspiciously soft cap with curious green feelers. Best worn away from civilized company.

sword.name: Sword
sword.description: A standard-issue sword with a rugged finish. Reliable, sturdy, and easy to wield—perfect for those just beginning their journey.

tempest-staff.name: Tempest Staff
tempest-staff.description: A staff swirling with trapped winds and thunder. Each cast unleashes a storm's wrath, swift, unrelenting, and untamed.

thief-mask.name: Thief Mask
thief-mask.description: Faintly cursed, this mask sometimes shifts when you aren't looking.

thundercoil.name: Thundercoil
statsSecondary: Deals increased damage at close range: +50%
Chance to autocast Suppressive Shot when attacking: +2% per refine

parsedStats.label: Deals increased damage at close range
Chance to autocast Suppressive Shot when attacking

thundercoil.description: A reinforced shotgun engineered for sustained pressure. Automatically unleashes suppressive fire, weakening enemies caught too close.

tinker-goggles.name: Tinker Goggles
tinker-goggles.description: Bulky goggles used by tinkerers to inspect tiny runes and schematics.

tinker-mask.name: Tinker Mask
tinker-mask.description: A curious contraption shielding the eyes from blinding light while keeping vision clear in the depths.

tomahawk.name: Tomahawk
statsSecondary: Chance to autocast Axe Throw when attacking: +2% per refine

parsedStats.label: Chance to autocast Axe Throw when attacking

tomahawk.description: A brutal twin-blade axe forged from heavy scrap. No elegance, just carnage.

tome.name: Tome
tome.description: A simple leather-bound book inscribed with common prayers. While plain in form, it channels the user's focus into gentle support magic.

tome-of-the-first-hymn.name: Tome of the First Hymn
tome-of-the-first-hymn.description: A weathered scripture said to contain the very first prayer sung to the heavens.

top-hat.name: Top Hat
top-hat.description: A crisp, navy-blue topper with a scarlet band. Worn by those who command attention.

totem-banner.name: Totem Banner
totem-banner.description: A tribal totem bound with cloth and charms. Radiates protective ancestral energy.

totem-mask.name: Totem Mask
totem-mask.description: A tribal mask imbued with primal energy. Wearing it awakens your inner beast.

treasure-box.name: Treasure Box
treasure-box.description: A mini loot chest worn by risk-takers. May or may not be trapped.

trident-of-tides.name: Trident of Tides
trident-of-tides.description: A spear said to command not just the sea, but the flow of time itself. Each thrust cuts faster than the current, striking before the wave can break.

triple-barrel-revolver.name: Triple Barrel Revolver
triple-barrel-revolver.description: A reinforced revolver fitted with multiple barrels, unleashing bursts of panic-inducing fire at close range.

turtle-shell.name: Turtle Shell
turtle-shell.description: A reinforced turtle shell worn proudly. Slow, steady, and strong.

twinblade.name: Twinblade
twinblade.description: Twin edges bound in one rhythm, striking fast and true. Those who wield it dance on the knife's edge of night.

umbral-blade.name: Umbral Blade
umbral-blade.description: A forbidden conduit that binds opposing forces within the same edge.

valiant-crown.name: Valiant Crown
valiant-crown.description: A traditional helm worn by champions of old. The gold trim signifies honor and command.

ventilator-mask.name: Ventilator Mask
ventilator-mask.description: Advanced filtration mask used by alchemists and rogue engineers. Improves resistance to toxins.

verdant-antlers.name: Verdant Antlers
verdant-antlers.description: Moss-covered antlers said to sprout from spirits of the deep woods. They hum softly when the wind passes.

verdant-core.name: Verdant Core
verdant-core.description: A gnarled staff binding nature's raw essence.

verdant-striders.name: Verdant Striders
verdant-striders.description: Woven from living vines and supple bark, these leggings move with the rhythm of the forest. Each step stirs unseen currents, quickening the body as if the wild itself urges you onward.

violet-arc.name: Violet Arc
statsSecondary: Chance to autocast Black Blade when attacking: +5%

parsedStats.label: Chance to autocast Black Blade when attacking

violet-arc.description: An overloaded plasma edge that tears energy directly from its wielder. Massively amplifies physical damage and critical force, but leaves the body fragile and exposed.

void-urn.name: Void Urn
void-urn.description: A sealed vessel marked with forbidden runes. Whispers echo from within.

voidthreads.name: Voidthreads
voidthreads.description: Dark strands stitched from forgotten silk, adapted for those who balance power, grace, and grit.

war-axe.name: War Axe
war-axe.description: Forged in dark rites, this crescent hefts like a falling star. Each arc rends bone with merciless force.

war-banner.name: War Banner
war-banner.description: A battle-worn flag bearing beast claw marks.

warborn-aegis.name: Warborn Aegis
warborn-aegis.description: A relic shield infused with rage and duty, carried by fallen champions.

warlord-emblem-shield.name: Warlord Emblem Shield
warlord-emblem-shield.description: A broad iron shield engraved with a sharp emblem. Designed to intimidate and absorb punishment.

wasteland-cleaver.name: Wasteland Cleaver
wasteland-cleaver.description: Scarred by ruin, this cleaver spins a tornado of rust and ruin, its vortex strike carves spirals through armor.

weaver-chest.name: Weaver Chest
weaver-chest.description: A tunic lined with shimmering threads and hidden pockets, woven by artisans who channel the latent power of enchanted cards. Perfect for those who collect, combine, or crack them open.

weaver-legs.name: Weaver Legs
weaver-legs.description: These layered wraps are reinforced with rune-stitched seams and subtle card slots, favored by Weavers who walk the fine line between creation and disassembly.

weaver-shoes.name: Weaver Shoes
weaver-shoes.description: Soft-soled and rune-etched, these shoes hum faintly with stored enchantments. Those who tread in them leave behind no trace, except the lingering echo of shuffled fate.

whale-backpack.name: Whale Backpack
whale-backpack.description: A playful aquatic-themed backpack resembling a whale, complete with a broad fin and water-spout nozzle. It hums with oceanic energy.

whisper-of-thorns.name: Whisper of Thorns
whisper-of-thorns.description: A finely balanced pistol coated in venomous intent. Each shot carries a quiet sting that lingers long after impact.

white-bishop-s-hood.name: White Bishop's Hood
white-bishop-s-hood.description: Worn by healers in the Grand Chapel. It radiates a serene aura.

wilderness-pack.name: Wilderness Pack
wilderness-pack.description: A heavy-duty hiker's load, complete with bedroll and grit.

wildroot-veil.name: Wildroot Veil
wildroot-veil.description: Carved from enchanted bark, this tribal mask connects its wearer to ancient woodland spirits.

willow-staff.name: Willow Staff
willow-staff.description: A simple staff carved from willow. Light and flexible, it supports steady spellcasting while remaining easy to swing.

windroot.name: Windroot
windroot.description: A branch wrapped around glowing crystal, channeling unseen currents.

windstrider-chest.name: Windstrider Chest
windstrider-chest.description: A light vest woven from enchanted leather, built to let every movement feel swift and precise.

windstrider-legs.name: Windstrider Legs
windstrider-legs.description: Flexible leggings that never snag, perfect for running, rolling, and loosing arrows on the move.

windstrider-shoes.name: Windstrider Shoes
windstrider-shoes.description: Feather-light boots that make each step nearly silent, as if the wind itself carries you forward.

winged-helm.name: Winged Helm
winged-helm.description: The winged helm of the Goblin Warchief, battered yet imposing. Its crest of iron wings proclaims dominance, a symbol of victory reforged in countless battles.

wings-of-valor.name: Wings of Valor
wings-of-valor.description: Symbolic wings representing a hero's deeds. They shimmer faintly with pride.

witch-s-whisk.name: Witch's Whisk
witch-s-whisk.description: An old straw broom repurposed into a magic wand. Often used by witches, pranksters, and those who prefer flair with their firepower.

witchsteps.name: Witchsteps
witchsteps.description: Embroidered with arcane thread and tipped with hexed soles, these boots hum faintly as spells course through your veins. One step, one thought, one cast.

wizardry-hat.name: Wizardry Hat
wizardry-hat.description: A classic pointed hat favored by archmages. Its gem core amplifies arcane channels.

wolfcrest-shield.name: Wolfcrest Shield
wolfcrest-shield.description: A stout shield bearing the emblem of a wolf. Symbol of loyalty and ferocity in battle.

wooden-guard.name: Wooden Guard
wooden-guard.description: An improvised shield made from broken wood and nailed crossbeams. Held together by hope.

wraith-of-dawn.name: Wraith of Dawn
wraith-of-dawn.description: The first light never reaches where its bolts have flown.

wraithlight.name: Wraithlight
wraithlight.description: An eerie skull wand burning with spectral fire. Said to whisper the names of the dead.

zephyr-cross.name: Zephyr Cross
zephyr-cross.description: A balanced shield etched with directional sigils. It breaks rushing winds and redirects force, leaving only stillness in its wake.

zephyrlight.name: Zephyrlight
zephyrlight.description: A radiant wand crowned with a golden crystal that glows like the midday sun.

Angel Card.name: Angel Card
Angel Card.description: A serene celestial being who's always ready to spread some heavenly wrath. Sweet but deadly!

Angel Mage Card.name: Angel Mage Card
Angel Mage Card.description: Don't let the robes fool you; this angel packs a magical punch. Prayers are optional, though!

Archangel Card.name: Archangel Card
Archangel Card.description: Majestic wings and a heart of gold, or is it? This angel has a dark side when provoked!

Ashrend Card.name: Ashrend Card
Ashrend Card.description: The broken remains of an alien creature or machine… but it still twitches with hostile life.

Bat Card.name: Bat Card
Bat Card.description: Tiny wings, big attitude! This bat's more trouble than a pack of mosquitoes.

Bat Lord Card.name: Bat Lord Card
Bat Lord Card.description: The king of bats. Don't ask for autographs; he's too busy hunting you down.

Bee Card.name: Bee Card
Bee Card.description: Always buzzing around, this little guy's only goal is to ruin your day with a sting.

Bird Card.name: Bird Card
Bird Card.description: Fluttering through the air, this bird is more than capable of making your life... interesting.

Blazewheel Card.name: Blazewheel Card
Blazewheel Card.description: A bizarre alien that rolls forward like a wheel, crushing everything in its path.

Bloom Card.name: Bloom Card
Bloom Card.description: A plant that seems sweet at first, but don't let it fool you, it can make you regret that hug.

Blossom Card.name: Blossom Card
Blossom Card.description: Like a flower, but with a grudge. Approach with caution, this one's got a temper.

Bogbloom Card.name: Bogbloom Card
Bogbloom Card.description: A bizarre plant from another world, its vines lash out with a hunger that feels far too intelligent.

Bomb Card.name: Bomb Card
Bomb Card.description: This mischievous monster might look cute, but it's got an explosive personality.

Boxy Robot Card.name: Boxy Robot Card
Boxy Robot Card.description: A clunky, cube-shaped machine with more power than looks. Don't underestimate its blocky frame.

Bud Card.name: Bud Card
Bud Card.description: Small, but don't be fooled, this budding little guy is just waiting to blossom into something scary!

Bumble Card.name: Bumble Card
Bumble Card.description: Cute, fuzzy, and always on the move. It's just trying to spread some chaos, not honey!

Bunny Card.name: Bunny Card
Bunny Card.description: This little fluffball might look harmless... but its bite is worse than its bark!

Burrow Card.name: Burrow Card
Burrow Card.description: Hidden beneath the sand, this beast's got a lot of attitude, and a lot of dirt.

Butterfly Fairy Card.name: Butterfly Fairy Card
Butterfly Fairy Card.description: With wings of magic and a dash of mischief, this fairy loves to sprinkle a little trouble!

Butterfly Hue Card.name: Butterfly Hue Card
Butterfly Hue Card.description: It's a fluttery little critter that might leave you enchanted, or just itchy.

Butterfly Pixie Card.name: Butterfly Pixie Card
Butterfly Pixie Card.description: Magical and mischievous, this pixie might give you a wink before causing havoc.

Cacti Card.name: Cacti Card
Cacti Card.description: A prickly friend with a sharp personality, don't try hugging it!

Cactus Card.name: Cactus Card
Cactus Card.description: This cactus doesn't just rule the desert; it rules with an iron fist... er, spines.

Cactus King Card.name: Cactus King Card
Cactus King Card.description: The king of the desert, spiky, stubborn, and a little too proud of his pointy crown.

Cat Bolt Card.name: Cat Bolt Card
Cat Bolt Card.description: Lightning-fast and furious, this cat's got a spark in its step, and it's shocking!

Cat Lightning Card.name: Cat Lightning Card
Cat Lightning Card.description: A cat that's got more than just nine lives, it's got nine lightning strikes, too!

Cat Meow Card.name: Cat Meow Card
Cat Meow Card.description: A simple meow from this furry feline, and your world might just get turned upside down.
stats: 10% chance to cast Thunderbolt on attack

Chick Card.name: Chick Card
Chick Card.description: Small, yellow, and probably plotting your doom under all that cuteness.

Cinderspike Card.name: Cinderspike Card
Cinderspike Card.description: A jagged alien beast, covered in crystalline spines sharp enough to pierce steel.

Cosmic Entity Card.name: Cosmic Entity Card
Cosmic Entity Card.description: A massive, single-eyed alien whose unblinking stare can pierce even the bravest of hearts.

Creeper Card.name: Creeper Card
Creeper Card.description: Sneaky and sly, this creepy crawly has a penchant for lurking in the shadows.

Cyclops Bat Card.name: Cyclops Bat Card
Cyclops Bat Card.description: Big, bad, and batty. This one's got its sights set on you, so run, if you can!

Cyclops Bat Mage Card.name: Cyclops Bat Mage Card
Cyclops Bat Mage Card.description: This cyclops has learned a thing or two from the dark arts, expect spells with a side of fury.

Cyclops Bat Wizard Card.name: Cyclops Bat Wizard Card
Cyclops Bat Wizard Card.description: A master of shadowy magic and even shadier business. It's a nightmare in the making.

Cyclops Card.name: Cyclops Card
Cyclops Card.description: One eye, two fists, and a serious vendetta. You won't see this one coming!

Cyclops Giant Card.name: Cyclops Giant Card
Cyclops Giant Card.description: Tall, angry, and completely unhinged. Good luck trying to make it past this one!

Cyclops Minion Card.name: Cyclops Minion Card
Cyclops Minion Card.description: A smaller cyclops, but still just as dangerous. This one's all about taking orders, yours.

Death Card.name: Death Card
Death Card.description: This shadowy figure isn't here for a chat, it's here to remind you of your inevitable fate.

Death Mage Card.name: Death Mage Card
Death Mage Card.description: A mage of death, weaving necromantic spells with a sinister smile. Don't cross him.

Delivery Robot Card.name: Delivery Robot Card
Delivery Robot Card.description: An oddly helpful machine repurposed for war, tossing deadly “packages” your way.

Direwolf Card.name: Direwolf Card
Direwolf Card.description: A savage wolf larger than most, feared for its cunning and the chilling howls that echo through the night.

Dog Bark Card.name: Dog Bark Card
Dog Bark Card.description: A yappy, fiery little dog that might just catch you off guard with a fiery surprise!

Dog Bowwow Card.name: Dog Bowwow Card
Dog Bowwow Card.description: Bigger, badder, and ready to bite. It's got a bark, but it's got firepower too!

Dog Pup Card.name: Dog Pup Card
Dog Pup Card.description: A tiny pup with a fiery heart, it might just be looking for a snack... or you!
stats: 10% chance to cast Firebolt on attack

Dragon Blizzard Card.name: Dragon Blizzard Card
Dragon Blizzard Card.description: A dragon that brings a chill to your bones, and not the friendly kind!

Dragon Darkness Card.name: Dragon Darkness Card
Dragon Darkness Card.description: It's not just the dark; it's the dragon's deadly presence in the shadows you should fear.

Dragon Dusk Card.name: Dragon Dusk Card
Dragon Dusk Card.description: This dragon brings with it an eerie calm... but you'll soon realize it's anything but peaceful.

Dragon Fire Card.name: Dragon Fire Card
Dragon Fire Card.description: A fiery force of nature, this dragon's breath could cook you in seconds.

Dragon Ice Card.name: Dragon Ice Card
Dragon Ice Card.description: Don't let the icy breath fool you, this dragon's just as cold-hearted as it is powerful.

Dragon Inferno Card.name: Dragon Inferno Card
Dragon Inferno Card.description: It's all about heat and destruction with this fiery dragon. Think you can handle the burn?

Dragon Nightfall Card.name: Dragon Nightfall Card
Dragon Nightfall Card.description: A shadowy dragon that comes with a cold chill and a lot of bite. Proceed with caution.

Dragon Spark Card.name: Dragon Spark Card
Dragon Spark Card.description: It may start with a spark, but this dragon has a blazing fire waiting for you!

Dragon Water Card.name: Dragon Water Card
Dragon Water Card.description: Water's their element, and they're not afraid to drown you in it!

Dragonfly Arrow Card.name: Dragonfly Arrow Card
Dragonfly Arrow Card.description: Fast and sharp, this dragonfly isn't just here to flutter by. It's a skilled hunter!

Dragonfly Darner Card.name: Dragonfly Darner Card
Dragonfly Darner Card.description: A little faster and a lot deadlier than most, this dragonfly can dart through the air like lightning.

Dragonfly Swift Card.name: Dragonfly Swift Card
Dragonfly Swift Card.description: With speed that'll leave you dizzy, this dragonfly's all about a quick strike.

Earthworm Card.name: Earthworm Card
Earthworm Card.description: A simple creature, but digging through the dirt is just the beginning of its underground trouble.

Egg Card.name: Egg Card
Egg Card.description: It might look innocent, but it's got big, scary plans for when it hatches!

Egglet Card.name: Egglet Card
Egglet Card.description: A tiny egg with legs! Cute, but it's plotting something sinister inside its shell.

Elder Wisp Blue Card.name: Elder Wisp Blue Card
Elder Wisp Blue Card.description: A calm, ancient spirit that glows with icy blue energy, chilling the air and soothing—or freezing—all nearby.

Elder Wisp Purple Card.name: Elder Wisp Purple Card
Elder Wisp Purple Card.description: A mysterious spirit wrapped in violet flame, whispering secrets and curses from another realm.

Elder Wisp Yellow Card.name: Elder Wisp Yellow Card
Elder Wisp Yellow Card.description: A luminous spirit that radiates golden light, guiding the lost but blinding its foes with brilliance.

Eyeball Bat Blue Card.name: Eyeball Bat Blue Card
Eyeball Bat Blue Card.description: A bat with an eye for detail. Its piercing gaze could be worse than its bite!

Eyeball Bat Green Card.name: Eyeball Bat Green Card
Eyeball Bat Green Card.description: A bat with an eye for detail. Its piercing gaze could be worse than its bite!

Eyeball Bat Red Card.name: Eyeball Bat Red Card
Eyeball Bat Red Card.description: A bat with an eye for detail. Its piercing gaze could be worse than its bite!

Eyeball Creep Blue Card.name: Eyeball Creep Blue Card
Eyeball Creep Blue Card.description: Creeping through the shadows, this eyeball monster's gaze is worse than its creepy crawl.

Eyeball Creep Green Card.name: Eyeball Creep Green Card
Eyeball Creep Green Card.description: Creeping through the shadows, this eyeball monster's gaze is worse than its creepy crawl.

Eyeball Creep Red Card.name: Eyeball Creep Red Card
Eyeball Creep Red Card.description: Creeping through the shadows, this eyeball monster's gaze is worse than its creepy crawl.

Eyeball Mage Blue Card.name: Eyeball Mage Blue Card
Eyeball Mage Blue Card.description: Eyes everywhere and magic in every blink, this mage doesn't miss a thing!

Eyeball Mage Green Card.name: Eyeball Mage Green Card
Eyeball Mage Green Card.description: Eyes everywhere and magic in every blink, this mage doesn't miss a thing!

Eyeball Mage Red Card.name: Eyeball Mage Red Card
Eyeball Mage Red Card.description: Eyes everywhere and magic in every blink, this mage doesn't miss a thing!

Fangroot Card.name: Fangroot Card
Fangroot Card.description: A twisted root from another world, snapping and biting with unnatural hunger.

Fire Card.name: Fire Card
Fire Card.description: They may have a name that sounds harmless, but this little guy will set everything ablaze.

Fire Mage Card.name: Fire Mage Card
Fire Mage Card.description: A fire mage with enough power to make the volcano look like a campfire.

Flame Card.name: Flame Card
Flame Card.description: With a fiery spirit and a burning desire to cause chaos, this fiery being isn't messing around!

Fledgling Card.name: Fledgling Card
Fledgling Card.description: It's just a little bird... until it starts pecking your face off.

Flora Card.name: Flora Card

Goblin Warblade Card.description: A goblin champion wielding a massive blade, reckless but deadly in battle.

Goblin Warchief Card.description: The toughest goblin of the horde, rallying its kin with brute force and bellowing war cries.

Goblin Warcrusher Card.description: This goblin prefers brute force, smashing anything in sight with overwhelming strength.

Goblin Warlock Card.name: Goblin Warlock Card
Goblin Warlock Card.description: A goblin twisted by dark magic, summoning flames and shadows to terrorize friend and foe alike.

Golem Earth Card.description: This giant stone golem is as tough as the earth itself, don't expect to break it easily!

Golem Fire Card.name: Golem Fire Card
Golem Fire Card.description: Made of fire and fury, this golem can heat things up pretty quickly!

Golem Ice Card.name: Golem Ice Card
Golem Ice Card.description: An icy golem that's as cold as its surroundings, don't get too close!

Grim Reaper Card.name: Grim Reaper Card
Grim Reaper Card.description: The embodiment of death, it's here to end your quest with a snip of its scythe!

Gripper Robot Card.name: Gripper Robot Card
Gripper Robot Card.description: A claw-armed contraption designed to crush and hold its prey with unrelenting grip.

Hare Card.name: Hare Card
Hare Card.description: Quick, nimble, and ready to dash away at the slightest sign of danger.

Haunt Card.name: Haunt Card
Haunt Card.description: A specter of doom, this haunting presence will chill you to the bone.

Hermit King Card.name: Hermit King Card
Hermit King Card.description: This hermit has a crown, and it's not afraid to use it. Watch out!

Horror Card.name: Horror Card
Horror Card.description: This nightmare of a monster is too terrifying for words. Beware the darkness it brings!

Housefly Icky Card.name: Housefly Icky Card
Housefly Icky Card.description: A pesky, buzzing housefly that's always in your face, bringing discomfort wherever it goes.

Housefly Junk Card.name: Housefly Junk Card
Housefly Junk Card.description: A larger, more annoying version of the common housefly, often found around filth and decay.

Housefly Nom Card.name: Housefly Nom Card
Housefly Nom Card.description: A particularly stubborn fly that enjoys buzzing around food and irritating travelers.

Ice Card.name: Ice Card
Ice Card.description: A cold and unfeeling monster that freezes everything in its path, leaving nothing but frost.

Ice Mage Card.name: Ice Mage Card
Ice Mage Card.description: A mage who bends ice and snow to their will, summoning storms to chill the bones of their enemies.

Icicle Card.name: Icicle Card
Icicle Card.description: A sharp shard of ice that's as deadly as it is cold, capable of impaling anything in its way.

Imp Demon Card.name: Imp Demon Card
Imp Demon Card.description: A mischievous demon with fiery red skin and a knack for causing trouble wherever it appears.

Imp Mischief Card.name: Imp Mischief Card
Imp Mischief Card.description: A playful imp that likes to prank and trick its victims, sometimes to deadly effect.

Lurker Card.name: Lurker Card

Petal Card.name: Petal Card

Treant Tree Evergreen Card.description: A sentient tree with a vast network of roots and branches, it can manipulate nature to its will.
